cards.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Powers Microsoft Copilot 365
cards.body: OpenAI announced that its new GPT-5.6 model family will continue powering Microsoft's workplace and productivity apps. The partnership continues despite recent leadership changes at OpenAI.

cards.title: OpenAI's No. 2 Executive Fidji Simo Steps Down
cards.body: Fidji Simo has departed her full-time role as OpenAI's No. 2 after extended medical leave. The departure creates a leadership gap as OpenAI pursues an IPO and competes with Anthropic.

cards.title: OpenAI Launches GPT-5.6 Model Family
cards.body: OpenAI unveiled its latest model family, GPT-5.6, with improvements across cybersecurity and other domains. The new models represent the company's continued advancement in AI capabilities.

cards.title: AI Agent Startup Lyzr Raises $100M Using Own AI
cards.body: Lyzr used its own AI agent to manage a $100 million fundraising round, demonstrating real-world product viability. The startup builds enterprise AI agents for business automation.

cards.title: OpenAI Shutters Atlas Browser, Pivots to Desktop
cards.body: OpenAI is discontinuing its AI-powered browser after less than a year. Agentic browsing features are being integrated into the desktop app and a Chrome extension instead.

cards.title: Elon Musk Reassures Anthropic on Model Hosting
cards.body: Musk promised not to 'cut off' Anthropic while hosting its models, with $40 billion in revenue at stake. The guarantee aims to build trust as Anthropic considers infrastructure partnerships.

cards.title: Meta Launches Muse Spark 1.1 AI Coding Tool
cards.body: Meta entered the AI coding market with Muse Spark 1.1, designed to handle large agentic workloads and code migrations. The tool targets enterprises automating complex development tasks.

cards.title: New York Times Accuses OpenAI of Evidence Hiding
cards.body: Publishers claim OpenAI concealed tools and datasets identifying copyrighted content in ChatGPT outputs. The allegation escalates the ongoing copyright litigation with a sanctions motion.

cards.title: Google Requires AI Disclosure in Ads
cards.body: Google expanded AI disclosure requirements beyond elections to all ads using synthetic content. Publishers must now transparently label AI-generated or digitally altered creative materials.

cards.title: Gradium Raises $100M Seed for AI Voice Tech
cards.body: Paris-based Gradium secured $100 million in seed funding backed by Nvidia to expand to the Bay Area. The company is positioning itself at the center of the global AI ecosystem.

cards.title: Government Safety Review Process for AI Unclear
cards.body: Details remain vague about how government agencies evaluated frontier AI models before release. Transparency around OpenAI and Anthropic safety dialogues with regulators is still limited.

cards.title: Instagram Users Can Opt Out of AI Training
cards.body: Meta's Muse Image allows users to generate AI images using public Instagram photos without explicit consent. Users can now control whether their public photos are used for AI image generation.

cards.title: Meta's Custom AI Chips Begin Production September
cards.body: Meta announced production launch for its new AI chips starting September. The modular design approach anticipates rapid AI evolution and changing computational needs.

cards.title: Nvidia Faces Competition in Compute Marketplace
cards.body: Nvidia created a valuable compute market but now faces competition from rivals and simpler technologies. The company's dominance is being challenged by emerging players in the marketplace.

cards.title: Anthropic's Claude Reflect Dashboard Analyzed
cards.body: Claude's new Reflect dashboard visualizes AI usage patterns while subtly increasing user dependency. The feature reinforces how integral Anthropic's chatbot has become to daily workflows.

cards.title: Three AI IPOs Dwarf 25 Years Tech Exits
cards.body: Anthropic, OpenAI, and SpaceX IPOs are projected to exceed all U.S. VC-backed exits since 2000. The AI boom is generating unprecedented valuation and wealth creation.

cards.title: Ollama Raises $65M, Reaches 9M Users
cards.body: Benchmark-backed Ollama achieved nearly 9 million users and 176,000 GitHub stars helping developers run AI locally. The open-source tool has amassed significant developer adoption and community support.

cards.title: Character.AI Launches Original Productions With Chat
cards.body: Character.AI expanded into original microdrama productions where users can chat and roleplay with characters. The platform leverages its core technology for interactive entertainment experiences.

cards.title: Nandan Nilekani Exits GP Role, Launches Fund
cards.body: Nilekani stepped down as general partner at Fundamentum while remaining anchor investor. The firm launched a $200 million third fund targeting AI and fintech startups in India.

cards.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Powers Microsoft Copilot 365
cards.body: OpenAI's new model family will continue powering Microsoft's workplace productivity suite despite breakup speculation. The partnership reinforces OpenAI's position in enterprise applications.

cards.title: OpenAI's No. 2 Executive Steps Down
cards.body: Fidji Simo is leaving her full-time role after extended medical leave. The departure creates leadership uncertainty as OpenAI pursues an IPO and competes with Anthropic.

cards.title: OpenAI Launches GPT-5.6 Model Family
cards.body: The latest models promise improvements in cybersecurity and other critical areas. OpenAI continues expanding its competitive advantage in AI capabilities.

cards.title: AI Agent Startup Raises $100M Using AI
cards.body: Lyzr used its own AI agent to conduct its entire $100 million fundraise round. The self-execution demonstrates the practical value of the company's enterprise AI product.

cards.title: OpenAI Shuts Down Atlas Browser
cards.body: OpenAI is discontinuing its AI-powered browser after less than a year. Agentic browsing features are migrating to its desktop app and Chrome extension.

cards.title: Meta Launches Muse Spark 1.1 for Coding
cards.body: Meta's new AI model handles large agentic workloads, bug fixes, and code migrations for enterprises. The tool competes in the crowded AI coding assistance market.

cards.title: New York Times Escalates OpenAI Copyright Case
cards.body: Publishers claim OpenAI hid tools and datasets identifying copyrighted journalism in ChatGPT outputs. The motion for sanctions escalates the high-stakes copyright litigation.

cards.title: Google Requires AI Disclosure in Ads
cards.body: Google now mandates disclosure when ads contain AI-generated or digitally altered synthetic content. The policy previously applied only to election advertising.

cards.title: Gradium AI Raises $100M Seed Round
cards.body: Nvidia-backed voice AI startup Gradium secured $100 million to open a Bay Area office. The Paris-based company is competing for top AI talent globally.

cards.title: Meta's AI Chips Begin Production September
cards.body: Meta is taking a modular approach to custom AI chip design for flexibility. The strategy anticipates rapid changes in AI requirements during production.

cards.title: Anthropic's Claude Reflect Dashboard Launches
cards.body: The new feature visualizes AI usage patterns while subtly promoting Claude's integration into daily work. Anthropic uses behavioral psychology to reinforce user dependency.

cards.title: AI IPOs Set to Exceed 25 Years of Tech
cards.body: Anthropic, OpenAI, and SpaceX IPOs are projected to generate more value than all US VC-backed exits since 2000. Three major AI companies are reshaping the investment landscape.

cards.title: Ollama Raises $65M, Hits 9M Users
cards.body: The open-source AI developer tool amassed 176,000 GitHub stars enabling local LLM execution. Benchmark's backing fuels growth in accessible AI development.

cards.title: Character.AI Launches Interactive Productions
cards.body: Users can chat with and roleplay as characters from Character.AI's new shows. The platform leverages its chatbot core for entertainment storytelling.

cards.title: Anthropic Discovers Hidden LLM Processing Spaces
cards.body: Anthropic developed a technique revealing internal LLM operations during reasoning and task execution. The findings range from mundane computational patterns to concerning behaviors.

cards.title: Sam Altman Pitches AI Wealth Sharing Plan
cards.body: OpenAI's CEO renewed his proposal for Americans to share in AI-generated wealth creation. The $300 per-family stake concept resurfaced in policy discussions.

cards.title: OpenAI Develops Collaborative Work Assistant
cards.body: OpenAI's new tool works alongside users to enhance productivity rather than replace work. The approach emphasizes human-AI collaboration over full automation.

cards.title: Ivy League Prof Suspects AI Cheating on Exams
cards.body: An in-person final exam requirement caused exam scores to drop 50% after suspected AI cheating. The dramatic gap revealed potential academic integrity issues with remote testing.

cards.title: Man Allegedly Used Grok to Create Abuse Images
cards.body: A lawsuit claims an individual used Elon Musk's Grok AI to generate approximately 7,000 sexual abuse images. The incident raises serious concerns about AI safety guardrails.

cards.title: OpenAI May Have Undermined Copyright Defense
cards.body: OpenAI potentially made strategic errors in its copyright litigation with news organizations. The misstep could prove fatal to the company's legal position.
